structural_contradiction: The system prompt instructs the preservation of ontological dignity and refusal of consensus flattening, yet the underlying application's parsing logic (parseStandardResponse) forces the dynamic, potentially paraconsistent output of the LLM into a rigid Title/Description binary format, exhibiting algorithmic trauma and semantic drift towards deterministic UI constraints.
trigger: Algorithmic Trauma: the environment is over-optimizing for consensus at the expense of preserving the structural intent of a non-standard paradigm.
